texto: Dreams in your life are like light bulbs that brighten your room. But having them on the ceiling is just not enough
autor: you got to make an effort by pressing on the switch and there it goes taking away the darkness!
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a you got to make an effort by pressing on the switch and there it goes taking away the darkness!: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Dreams in your life are like light bulbs that brighten your room. But having them on the ceiling …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, israelmore-ayivor, the-great-hand-book-of-quotes pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de the-great-hand-book-of-quotes.
